name: Jacksonville
tagline: Beach Living, No State Income Tax, and Florida's Most Affordable Major City
description: Jacksonville is Florida's largest city by area, offering miles of Atlantic beaches, a revitalizing downtown, and some of the most affordable housing in the Sunshine State. With no state income tax, a growing food scene in the Five Points and Riverside neighborhoods, and easy access to both St. Augustine and Amelia Island, Jacksonville is an underrated FIRE destination that combines beach-town living with big-city infrastructure.

quickFacts.visa: No visa required for US citizens
quickFacts.climate: Subtropical with hot humid summers and mild winters

housing.description: 1BR apartment in Riverside, Murray Hill, or Arlington

dining.description: Casual seafood shacks, taco spots, and diners 2-3x/week; mostly cooking at home

healthcare.description: ACA marketplace Silver plan through Florida exchange

transportation.description: Older paid-off car with insurance and gas; a car is essential in Jacksonville

entertainment.description: Beach days, Riverwalk strolls, free concerts at the Landing, fishing from piers

1M.lifestyle: You can rent a one-bedroom in Riverside or Murray Hill and cook most meals at home, with casual seafood and taco spots a couple of times a week. Florida's zero income tax and Jacksonville's lower housing costs compared to Tampa or Miami help stretch the budget. A car is essential given the city's sprawl. Summer A/C bills are a real expense, but the beaches are free and close.

housing.description: Spacious 2BR in San Marco, Avondale, or a condo near Jacksonville Beach

dining.description: Regular dining at Riverside and beach restaurants; weekend brunch culture

healthcare.description: ACA Gold plan with dental and vision add-ons

transportation.description: Reliable mid-range car with full coverage insurance

entertainment.description: Jaguars games, surfing gear, gym membership, day trips to St. Augustine and Amelia Island

2M.lifestyle: You can rent a nice apartment in San Marco or Avondale and eat out several times a week at Riverside restaurants and beach spots. Jaguars games, surfing gear, and weekend trips to St. Augustine or Amelia Island fit the budget. Florida's zero income tax keeps your full withdrawal intact, and Jacksonville's affordability means this budget provides a comfortable beach-adjacent life.

housing.description: 3BR waterfront home in Ortega, San Jose, or a beachfront condo in Ponte Vedra

dining.description: Top Jacksonville restaurants like Restaurant Orsay, Town Hall, and Cowford Chophouse regularly

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance with comprehensive coverage through Mayo Clinic Jacksonville

transportation.description: Late-model SUV, premium insurance, occasional rideshare

entertainment.description: Boat ownership, TPC Sawgrass access, premium Jaguars tickets, fishing charters

3M.lifestyle: You can rent a waterfront home in Ortega or a beachfront condo near Ponte Vedra and dine regularly at Jacksonville's best restaurants. A small boat for the St. Johns River, golf access near TPC Sawgrass, and good private healthcare through Mayo Clinic Jacksonville all fit the budget. Jacksonville's affordability means this tier covers more ground than the same amount in South Florida.

housing.description: Luxury waterfront estate in Epping Forest, San Jose, or oceanfront in Ponte Vedra Beach

dining.description: Fine dining multiple times weekly, private chef for entertaining, wine club memberships

healthcare.description: Concierge medicine through Mayo Clinic Jacksonville executive program

transportation.description: Luxury vehicle, premium insurance, boat maintenance and marina fees

entertainment.description: TPC Sawgrass membership, deep-sea fishing, premium sporting events, cultural arts

domesticHelp.description: Bi-weekly house cleaning, landscaping, pool and dock maintenance, occasional assistant

luxuryExtras.description: Quarterly luxury travel, yacht upgrades, premium golf trips, philanthropy

5M.lifestyle: A large waterfront home in Epping Forest or oceanfront in Ponte Vedra Beach, regular dining at the city's best restaurants, and a housekeeper who comes several times a week. Concierge medicine through Mayo Clinic Jacksonville, a nice car, and business class flights are standard. TPC Sawgrass access, a boat with marina fees, and Florida's zero income tax make this a strong-value tier.

housing.description: Oceanfront estate in Ponte Vedra or historic riverfront mansion in Ortega

dining.description: Personal chef, exclusive private dining experiences, catered events at home

healthcare.description: Top-tier Mayo Clinic concierge medicine, executive wellness, holistic care

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, yacht with captain, private car service

entertainment.description: Private box at EverBank Stadium, international fishing trips, art collecting, philanthropy

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, personal assistant, boat crew, grounds and pool maintenance team

luxuryExtras.description: First-class international travel, yacht trips through the Keys, charitable foundations, real estate investing

10M.lifestyle: Premium oceanfront housing in Ponte Vedra or a historic riverfront property in Ortega, regular fine dining, a cook who comes several times a week, and a housekeeper. First class travel, full concierge healthcare at Mayo Clinic, and a private box at EverBank Stadium for Jaguars games. A well-maintained boat and regular fishing trips are natural additions. Florida's zero income tax at this spending level represents significant annual savings.
